math_recheck: Re-derived against the 1956 primary (J. Chem. Phys. 24, 966) and its companion (24, 979): companion Eq.(25) free-energy functional, primary Eq.(38) ΔF*, Eq.(33) multiplier, appendix Eqs.(29)/(59) field reductions, m=-1/2-ΔG°/2λ giving m²λ=(λ+ΔG°)²/4λ; verified the worked example runs and reproduces normal→activationless(−ΔG°=λ)→inverted, slope ½ near ΔG°=0, and the h/4πτ broadening numbers (0.075/1.5/15 kcal/mol). Found and fixed an inconsistent ½ distribution in the F functional.
fixes: reasoning.md:27 and answer.md:36 — F functional was written with the ½ applied to only the first and third terms (E_c·E_c/8π, P_u/2α_u) but not to −P·E_c or −P_u·E, an internally inconsistent distribution; rewrote to the source's canonical Eq.(25) form F=½∫{E_c·E_c/4π − P·E_c + P_u·(P_u/α_u − E)}dV
answer.md:132-133 — corrected worked-example output rounding (-45.0/-60.0 → -45.1/-60.1) to match the actual %7.1f run
context.md:142 and context.md:151 and reasoning.md:100 — removed self-compliance meta-labels ('pre-method scaffold'→'scaffold'; '(pre-method facts)' stripped from code comments)
